wikitext.*:
Guardians are people who donate real world money which is used to sponsor [[Finch Plus]] for users who cannot afford it. The Official Developers Guardian page is https://finchcare.com/guardians and it supersedes anything here. The following is merely a guideline. It was introduced on May 10, 2022. == Sponsoring == Guardians can sponsor monthly or yearly. Guardians have different titles based on how much is given and how many people can be sponsored. Anyone can sign up to be a guardian through the app, or online at the Finch Care Guardians webpage (https://finchcare.com/guardians). Users can also make a one-time contribution through the app. ==Sponsoring a specific friend== You can only sponsor a specific person through the website. It costs the full price with no discounts. (Last checked January 2025.) ==Guardian levels== === Ally === [[File:AllyGuardian.png|none|thumb]] Ally guardians sponsor one person a month or twelve people a year if they sign up online. Ally guardians sponsor one person a month or twelve people a year if they sign up through the app. === Protector === [[File:ProtectorGuardian.png|none|thumb]] Protector guardians sponsor five people a month or sixty people a year if they sign up online. Protector guardians sponsor three people a month or thirty-six people a year if they sign up through the app. === Champion === [[File:Champion Guardian.png|none|thumb]] Champion guardians sponsor eleven people a month or 132 people a year if they sign up online. Champion guardians sponsor six people a month or seventy-two people a year if they sign up through the app. === Superhero === [[File:SuperheroGuardian.png|none|thumb]] Superhero guardians give a custom contribution to sponsor more than eleven people a month or more than 132 people a year. The option to become a Superhero Guardian is only available online on the Finch Care website. ===Various=== The Finch app allows you to make one-time donations of more affordable amounts to help a few people. Note that the Finch website says that you should only be a Guardian if you can afford it. "Please do not become a Guardian if it would cause you any financial hardship." The Finch app allows you to sponsor 1, 2, 3, 7, or 15 people with a one-time donation.
The Finch website allows you to Use the "Superhero" selection to define your own donation, small or large. == Cost Comparison == Comparing plans is complex due to the number of people sponsored, and the difference between paying through the app versus the website. "Equivalents" are shown to help compare the plans, but the '''bolded''' numbers are the actual price choices, either per month, per tear, or a one-time donation. Although this snapshot may sometimes appear inconsistent, the reason for the disparity is due to the above factors - the pricing is actually consistent. The chart is ordered by the number of people sponsored, and a "jump" may be visible due to the above factors. In every case, donating through the Finch website is a better value than through the app store.{{Clear}} [[File:Finch Guardian Donation plans.png|500x500px]] {{Clear}} == Benefits of Sponsoring == Becoming a guardian does not grant your own Finch Plus membership - only to other people who need one. If you want Finch Plus for yourself, you must sign up and pay for it in the usual way. All Guardians receive access to Guardian-only channels on the Finch Fam Discord server. This includes a Guardian-only general chat channel and a sneak peek channel. Finch staff members give Guardians sneak peeks for upcoming events. Guardians also receive a custom role in Discord with their title. In the Finch app, the Guardian's birb also receives the Guardian's title. [[File:Blue Sparkles.jpg|thumb]]Other benefits are a monthly gift of rainbow stones, a one-time clothing gift, and Guardian exclusive sparkle effects for the user's birb.Sparkle effects for Guardians:{{Clear}} [[File:GuardianSparkles.jpg|thumb|left]]{{Clear}} {| class="fandom-table" |+Benefit Comparison !Title !Rainbow Stones per month (online signup) ! Rainbow Stones per month (app signup) !Gift |- |Ally |600 |500 |Item |- |Protector |2500 |1500 |Part of an Outfit |- |Champion |6000 |3000 |Full Outfit |- |Superhero |Depends on contribution |N/A |Full Outfit |} == Hall of The Guardians == Hall of the Guardians is an official Finch webpage (resource intensive) where guardians can put a quote for others to read with a credit to their name if they so choose. Any guardian can have a quote put there or have their name credited on that page. == Community Milestones == Each month there's community milestones for how many users are getting sponsored. All users of the app, even if they aren't guardians get rewards. You can sell the items you might receive as well so its a good way to save rainbowstones. These rewards are: * Giftbox for everyone -> when 10% of people in need are sponsored * Rare Giftbox for everyone -> when 20% of people in need are sponsored * Legendary Giftbox for everyone -> when 50% of people in need are sponsored * Special Day Trip for Everyone -> when 100% of people in need are sponsored [[File:CommunityMilestonesSponsoringUsers.png|thumb]] Its unclear where the special Day Trip would go to, as that milestone hasnt been reached before. ==Raffle for non-members== Guardian funds are used to sponsor Finch Plus for non-members for a one month period. Recipients are chosen at random by a Raffle. Due to the number of generous Guardians, multiple people can win in one raffle. If you are not a member and can't afford Finch Plus, you can enter by going to the top left settings menu, then click "Become a Guardian." In the Guardian interface, below the "Gift Sponsorships" button, there is a section about the raffle. Click "Enter the raffle." It will ask you for several things which will only be used if you win the raffle. First, you write a message which will be given to your sponsor if you are chosen. Then there is a toggle to choose whether or not you want to share your friend code with your Guardian. Then it asks what preferred name you would like used if someone requests a list of winners. Then you can press the "Enter the raffle" button. ===Raffle-winners results=== You will be notified in game that you have won a raffle, and will immediately have full [[Finch Plus]] benefits. Additionally, you will get a blue sparkle effect in your inventory to use on your finch outfits during your free month. Eventually, when the sponsorship ends, you will not have the sparkle effect in your inventory anymore. However, if you have a saved outfit with it, you can still use it. You can also choose whether to continue getting sponsored, getting back to the free version, or if you really want membership but cannot afford it, they may offer you a reduced price. File:Annualfinchplus.jpg File:Monthlyfinchplus.jpg ==Notes== Guardians were added on May 10th, 2022. [[Category:Finch Fam]]
